title: Blackspur BB-RK100 Radiator Key Set
features: Manufactured with a square opening which will fit most radiator heating systems
description: Product Description Blackspur radiator solid brass keys are manufactured with a square opening which will fit most radiator heating systems making them ideal for 'bleeding' your radiators. Packed in skin blister. Approximate item weight 36 grams. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 2x Keys
